g.text: Line up on the first mark.
Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Rev clear and run loud past the guardhou...
Cut power and drift to the guard boat.
Slip the ebb gap on the seaward corner.
Cut straight over the chain floats.
Gun the engine and force the net.
Wait at the boom for the gap to widen.
Ram the floats to break a wider gap.
Try the shoreward end, nearer the wall.
Gamble it and take the risk.
Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Trust the wrong buoy and hold on.
Signal the launch shadowing the line.
Steer the single-topmark line, buoy to b...
Cut inside the line to save the distance...
Follow the nearest buoy, mark unread.
Swing wide around the whole buoy line.
Hold speed and thread it fast.
Steer by the buoys' lights alone.
Gamble it and take the risk.
Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Open up and outrun her down the lane.
Show a light and heave to.
Cross astern on her turn, in the wake.
Dash across ahead of her bow.
Match her speed and shadow her up the la...
Stop dead and let her pass close by.
Duck across right under her stern gun.
Wait for her to leave the lane entirely.
Gamble it and take the risk.
Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Gun it and dare the gunners.
Cut power and stand into the light.
Run on the dark, freeze under the beam.
Keep steady speed through the sweep.
Turn hard away when the light appears.
Race to beat the beam across.
Hide in the glare by steering at the sou...
Signal-flash back to confuse the crew.
Gamble it and take the risk.
Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Open up and run for it.
Cut the engine dead and wait.
Throttle down to a crawl and drift the t...
Hold cruising revs to clear it quickly.
Blip the throttle to hold your heading.
Reverse to hold against the tide.
Gamble it and take the risk.
Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Force a new lane on nerve.
Stop and hail the shore for a pilot.
Hold dead center down the clear drift.
Take the wider gap to starboard.
Speed up to spend less time in it.
Nudge a float aside to open the lane.
Gamble it and take the risk.
Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Ram at full speed and commit.
Ground her gently and wave in the skiff.
Run the deep scour off the wreck's stern...
Cross amidships where it looks calm.
Try the bow end, nearer and quicker.
Ram across to skip the plating.
Drift over slow on the current alone.
Gamble it and take the risk.
Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Push through the fall on nerve.
Show a white light and stop.
Run the lull just behind the last row.
Push ahead of the rows to clear it.
Hold position and wait it out.
Charge straight through at full power.
Turn back seaward out of range.
Gamble it and take the risk.
Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Trust your gut over the needle.
Lie still and wait to be found.
Hold the compass course, slow and steady...
Steer by feel toward the shore.
Sound the horn to fix a bearing.
Stop and drift until it lifts.
Gamble it and take the risk.
Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Ram the gap and outrun them.
Douse everything and let them close.
Thread the dark gap between two lamps.
Slip close past the nearest picket.
Charge where the gap looks widest.
Follow a picket in as a screen.
Wait for a lamp to be doused.
Cross where two lamps overlap, thinking ...
Gamble it and take the risk.
Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Run past the warden loud and fast.
Lay off and let the warden come.
Slip the boom behind the skiff's turn.
Cross right under the skiff's lantern.
Force the log line at speed.
Cut the net with a knife over the side.
Wait in the reeds for the skiff to moor.
Gamble it and take the risk.
Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Stand off and signal for a shore boat.
Cross on a swell's back through the deep...
Drive in without waiting on the sets.
Take the shortest line over the shallows...
Gun over the break and slam through.
Quarter the swell at an angle.
Gamble it and take the risk.
Hold the line and slip on quiet.
Gun the beach and drive over the wire.
Stop in the wash and stand with hands ra...
Come in on the leading mark, down the cu...
Beach her wherever the shore is nearest.
Hit the beach hard to punch the belt.
Land off on the flank away from the lane...
Come straight in fast on a guess at the ...
Gamble it and take the risk.
Give the countersign and hold your groun...
Break inland past the figure without wai...
Draw first on the figure that moves.
Take the clean quiet handoff and vanish ...
Take the hard fast route out under the g...
Simply hand off the cargo and stand down...
